name: Button: Gradient Background
instructions:
1. Go to your GHL funnel/website builder
2. Add this CSS to **Settings → Custom CSS**
3. All buttons with class `.c-button` will get the gradient background
4. To customize colors, change the gradient values in the CSS

**Note:** This targets all buttons by default. To target specific buttons only, add a unique class.

name: Button: Icon Float Right
instructions:
1. Go to your GHL funnel/website builder
2. Add this CSS to **Settings → Custom CSS**
3. Select your button element and add the class: `button-icon-float-right`
4. Add an icon to your button (it will float to the right side)

**How it works:**
- Hides the start icon, keeps end icon
- Positions the icon on the right side of the button
- Responsive - adjusts on mobile

name: Multiple Popup in GHL
instructions:
**Setup:**
Add the script in a Code Block at the bottom of your page.

**If popup trigger is an IMAGE:**
1. Set Image Action to "Open popup"
2. Copy the Image ID (without the "#")
3. Open popup settings, paste the Image ID as a class on the popup row
4. Add class `pop-row` to each row inside the popup

**If popup trigger is a BUTTON:**
1. Set Button Action to "Open Popup"
2. Add class `pop-button` to the button
3. Copy the Button ID
4. Paste the Button ID as a class on the popup row

**Note:** Requires jQuery (included in the script)

[Order Bump] Interactive Type 3 - Green Box Order Bump
instructions:
**Setup:**

1. Add the CSS to **Settings → Custom CSS**

2. Add class `add-option-btn` to your order bump button
   - Go to Button Settings → Advanced → Custom Class

3. Set button action to "Website URL" and input the checkout form ID
   - Find the form ID by inspecting the checkout form element

**How it works:**
- Button shows "ADD" by default
- When clicked, turns green with checkmark
- On hover over added state, shows "REMOVE" option in red

name: Reveal hidden section base from Vimeo Progress Timelineline Progress
html:
Hidden Content Revealed at 3:32!

   

This section is now visible because the video reached 3 minutes and 32 seconds.
instructions:
**Setup:**

1. Add the **Vimeo Player API** script to your page head:
   \`<script src="https://player.vimeo.com/api/player.js"></script>\`

2. Add the CSS to **Settings → Custom CSS**

3. Add the Vimeo iframe with \`id="vimeo-player"\`

4. Create your hidden section with \`id="hidden-section"\`

5. Add the JavaScript to a Code Block at the bottom of your page

**Customization:**
- Change \`data.seconds >= 212\` to your desired reveal time
- 212 seconds = 3 minutes 32 seconds
- For multiple sections, use the sectionIds array

**How it works:**
- Sections start hidden via CSS (\`display: none\`)
- JS monitors Vimeo playback time
- When time threshold is reached, sections are revealed

name: GHL Colored Tabs
instructions:
(embed video here)

1. Add row for tab navigation. Add class tabs-nav.
2. In this sample, I added 5 columns. Add image feature element in each columns then add class ‘tab-menu’
3. For each Tab-content, add rows then add class ‘tab-content’ in each of it.

*Note: Automatically, the order of each tab-menu is from left to right and for the tab-content is from top to bottom. So the first tab-menu is for the first tab-content. So on and so fort.*

name: Timeline Swiper Slider
GHL Image Carousel (marquee style)
Swiper slider with thumbnails
Multiple Popup in GHL (with exit popup function)
instructions:
**Setup:**
Add the script in a Code Block at the bottom of your page.

**If popup trigger is an IMAGE:**
1. Set Image Action to "Open popup"
2. Copy the Image ID (without the "#")
3. Open popup settings, paste the Image ID as a class on the popup row
4. Add class \`pop-row\` to each row inside the popup

**If popup trigger is a BUTTON:**
1. Set Button Action to "Open Popup"
2. Add class \`pop-button\` to the button
3. Copy the Button ID
4. Paste the Button ID as a class on the popup row

**Exit Intent Popup:**
- Add class \`exit-popup\` to the popup row you want shown on exit
- Triggers when user moves cursor to top of page (about to leave)

**Note:** Requires jQuery (included in the script)
